base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of death_hit — a character from 1987 contra. Hit-reaction: jerk-back. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hit-reaction: jerk-back → fly-back → fall sprawl — iconic Contra death animation

nudges.delta: fall sprawl — iconic Contra death animation
